sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Megagon Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player collects Mega-Key to transform into larger, stronger form called Megagon. HP conversion: 1 HP per 5,000 points scored as Amagon. Megagon has melee punch (8x damage), chest energy waves (16x damage, multi-target, costs 1 HP per use). Cannot use machine gun in this form.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay mechanics (transformation system, weapon types) with no quantitative physics parameters documented. No movement speed, gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel precision data available.
